title: Night at the Movies: Movie Jigsaw Puzzle for Adults (1000 pieces) Filled with 101 Riddles to Solve
features: A DRIVE-IN CINEMA LIKE NO OTHER: We’ve packed this grown-up 1000 piece movie jigsaw puzzle for adults with 101 riddles for you to solve.
SOLVE THE RIDDLES WHILE YOU BUILD: Each riddle is the title of a famous movie. A “Ram” holding a “Bow”? Must be Rambo in this puzzle for adults.
THAT’S (NOT) ALL FOLKS: Once you’ve finished building this movie puzzle, use the checklist to make sure you’ve found every single movie. Then, find out how many you got right!
LIKE A HOLLYWOOD VERSION OF WHERE’S WALDO: There are over 100 Hollywood classics, hiding away inside this high quality 1000 piece movie jigsaw puzzle for adults. Think you can spot them all?
NOT JUST FOR MOVIE BUFFS: It’s filled with world-famous movies that everyone’s heard of, making it the perfect gift for friends, families, parents and adults. That’s Christmas sorted then!
description: Product Description The Hidden Movies Jigsaw Puzzle NIGHT AT THE MOVIES CAN YOU PIECE IT TOGETHER? Night at the Movies is a grown-up 1000 piece jigsaw puzzle for Adults who love movies. 101 HIDDEN MOVIES TO FIND. At this drive-in there are riddles to find and solve. Each one is the title of a very famous movie. Once you crack a riddle, write the name of the movie in the checklist inside the box. Then check your answer to see how many you got right. EASY TO LEARN, QUICK TO PLAY: You won't get too puzzled by this perfect gift for friends, families, parents and adults. 101 movies in a jigsaw Puzzle HOW TO PLAY NIGHT IN THE MOVIES Night at the movies is the perfect puzzle for every movie lovers. Grab some popcorn and get started! You can use you favourite puzzle solving techniques, like flipping all the pieces to be face up, starting with the borders of the jigsaw or getting stuck in with the first piece you spot. Ram+bow? FIND THE MOVIES Once you finish putting together all 1000 pieces of the jigsaw, take a step back and admire your masterpiece. Then get ready for the next step of the puzzle. You have to solve 101 hidden movie riddles in the puzzle by figuring out elements of the puzzles that could have relation with a movie, for example a ram+bow? Which movie do think it is? Keep going like that until you complete your whole checklist. BEAUTIFULLY ILLUSTRATED The puzzle has been lovingly illustrated by our in-house artist, who spend over 100 hours perfecting it. There are many layers of riddles and movie references buried in the artwork. FAMOUS MOVIES Night at the movies is a 1000 pieces jigsaw puzzle with 101 famous movies that everyone knows. Try your best matching the things in the puzzles to guess the right movies. You can share with us your checklist to see if you get all the movies right. How many pieces does Night At The Movies Have? Night At The Movies is a 1000 piece jigsaw. How can I check if I've spotted correctly the 101 movies? There’s a website link in the box to check if your answers are correct (with no spoilers!) Can players under 12 years old play Night At The Movies? Players under 12 years old can play Night At The Movies if they’re up for a challenge. Just be careful with really young players due to the size of the puzzle pieces. Is Night At The Movies suitable for big groups? Yes, you can have as many players as you like to build the puzzle and later to try to find the 101 hidden movies.
